column11: Good day! How can I assist you? Click on the 'Connect with a live agent' button for immediate support. Our team is available Monday to Friday, 9:00 to 18:00 (GMT+8). For assistance outside these hours, please email us at support@cinnox.com. Your satisfaction is our priority!  感謝聯絡 CINNOX！如需即時協助，請點擊 “Find a live agent/尋找線上客服” 以獲得即時支援。我們的團隊在週一至週五的9:00至18:00（GMT+8）提供服務。在非辦公時間，請透過電郵support@cinnox.com聯絡我們，我們將盡快回覆。
